text.title: Methodologies Index Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.code: { "domain": "research", "groups": [ "market-sizing", "competitive-intel", "user-research", "discovery-ops", "framework-routing", "trend-and-forecast" ], "methodologies": [ { "slug": "business-model-research", "tier": "pro", "path": "pro/research/researcher/business-model-research", "complexity": "deep", "produces": "report", "summary": "Builds a 9-block Canvas with P10/P50/P90 unit economics and 5 stress tests." } ], "count": 1 }

example.note: Only 1 group (need 3-8); methodology row missing tier/path/complexity/produces/summary; count attr mismatches actual array length.
